name: Tinta Academy V3
tagline: Wine education platform and WSET Approved Programme Provider in Uruguay
description: A comprehensive wine education platform for Tinta Academy, Uruguay's first WSET Approved Programme Provider. Manages the full student lifecycle including course enrollment, multi-step registration, online payments via MercadoPago, and automated notifications. Features an admin panel for course management, student tracking, and order processing.
highlights: Multi-step enrollment flow with coupon validation and payment integration
MercadoPago payment processing with webhook-driven order state machine
Admin dashboard for managing courses, students, orders, and educators
Dual notification system with Resend emails and Slack webhooks
Clerk-based authentication with role-based access control
